name: Garlic Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. For each cup of raw peanuts, start with a small amount of garlic powder, about 1/4 teaspoon.
2. Stir well to blend the ingredients together.
3. Increase the garlic powder to taste as the peanuts warm up.
4. Spread the peanuts out on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake in an oven set to 300°F until heated through.
